title: CCTV Camera Firmware Version Inventory and Compliance
app: Custom TA (NVR REST/syslog), ONVIF pull, Hikvision ISAPI HEC, or Milestone connector mapped to listed sourcetypes
spl:
index=physical sourcetype="nvr:diagnostic" earliest=-1d
| eval fw=coalesce(firmware_version, sw_version, "")
| eval model=coalesce(camera_model, vendor_model, "")
| stats values(fw) as firmware dc(fw) as fw_variants by vendor model
| where fw_variants>1 OR match(fw, "(?i)2018|v1\.0")
description: Stale firmware clusters cameras for CVE exposure; inventory proves patch cadence to auditors.
value: Reduces exploit risk from default credentials bugs.
implementation: (1) Weekly poll VMS. (2) Join vendor advisory CSV. (3) Maintenance window automation.
grandmaExplanation: We list camera software versions so outdated devices are patched.
